## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Refreshes for technical content will be approached with a lighter touch, focusing on SEO optimization and redirects to updated resources](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Comparison pages to be optimized for conversions with minimal internal links and strong CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Performance metrics show leveling off but near all-time highs; some anomalies in impression data noted](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Integration pages performance dipped slightly; team reviewing for potential enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Team discussed approach for refreshing older, technical content](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Agreed on lighter refresh: SEO polish, links to latest docs, outdated content flags](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Paul and Theo to review refreshed content and decide on further updates or archiving](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Vivek to update refresh table with new status indicators for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### New Content and Comparison Pages

  - [On track to deliver 7 new pieces of content this week](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Comparison pages to focus on conversion:](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [No external links, just one strong CTA (Launchpad demo)](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Multiple CTA placements possible (top, middle)](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Team waiting on backend updates to publish comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Plan to automate comparison page creation using established template](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Workflows and Automations

  - [Image generation: Awaiting Figma template from Golzar](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Staging: Engineering team working on automation to resolve formatting issues](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Octave integration: Team seeking API key for artifact automation](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [Mara noted Victor may have already shared the API key](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Performance Report

  - [Overall performance leveled off but near all-time highs](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Google remains top referral source](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Anomaly in non-branded impressions data (significant drop)](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [Team attributes to Search Console fluctuations, not cause for concern](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Conversions:](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [Clicks on pricing links increased](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [HubSpot demo form submissions slightly decreased](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [Month-on-month increase in conversion events](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Cohort Performance

  - [Integration pages performance leveled off, slight 3.7% monthly dip](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Other cohorts improved in performance](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [LLM referrals holding steady](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to proceed with lighter refreshes on technical content](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Team to implement strong CTAs on comparison pages once backend is ready](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - Golzar to share Figma template for image generation (add <team@growthxlabs.com>)
  - [Vivek's team to provide concrete recommendations for integration pages by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Confirm Octave API key access for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance metrics, especially the impression anomaly](https://fathom.video/share/Dfnvx9yTqfstzxL9dzsgLpd2-h-pEAYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
